programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: A poor girl from Southern Italy comes to Milan to escape an unfaithful fiancé and gets a job as a saleswoman in a department store. Quickly, the boss catches his attention.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: A poor girl from Southern Italy comes to Milan to escape an unfaithful fiancé and gets a job as a saleswoman in a department store. Quickly, the boss catches his attention.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Between betrayals and unthinkable alliances, Brooke sets in motion her plans to conquer power and win Marianne's heart, while Sandokan and Yanez prepare for the final battle for freedom.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: When Leyla decides to leave, Yildiz and Ender are convinced that they have won the war, but everything gets complicated when she changes her mind. At the same time, Sahika, completely out of control, starts a new and dangerous game.

programme.title: Family Friends
programme.desc: A childhood friend of a wedding planner decides to hire her to organize his wedding and the two become increasingly closer while the bride-to-be is focused on work.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Sandokan, in command of his crew, boards a ship to steal its cargo and frees a Dayak prisoner. The man is convinced that Sandokan is the warrior foretold by an ancient prophecy, but Sandokan pays no attention to this.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Viola Vitale, Miss Italy and fashion journalist, returns to Sicily to look for her father. He starts working for a digital news company and teams up with police inspector Francesco Demir to solve crimes with the help of synesthesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)
programme.desc: Onur and Lale go on a blind date arranged by their mothers and wake up the next morning in the same bed.

programme.title: Godfather... But Little
programme.desc: Suddenly realizing he loves his best friend, a womanizer takes advantage of his role as her "maid of honor" to ruin her wedding.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Asher struggles with feelings of guilt after misdiagnosing his first patient. As Park and Morgan form an unlikely bond, a near-fatal accident brings Glassman and Debbie into trouble.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: As Dr. Audrey Lim, Chief of Surgery, struggles to deal with the residual emotional trauma of COVID-19, she encounters a young war veteran with a debilitating case of Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Leyla decides to stay and face everyone, while Ender tries to prevent the tragedy without success. At the same time, Kaya brings Sahika back, triggering a new conflict in the house.

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: The discovery of a skeleton among the rubble of a building under renovation reveals that one of Lake Eden's most beloved citizens was not who he claimed to be. Much to her fiance's dismay, Hannah decides to investigate the case on her own.

programme.title: The Inheritance of the Enchanted Veil
programme.desc: In the second part of the trilogy, Emma travels to Italy to teach and investigate a wedding veil that is said to bring love to the wearer. There, she meets Paolo, son of a family that makes handmade lace.

programme.title: Ella is John
programme.desc: A couple on the run embark on an unforgettable journey in a motorhome they named «The Leisure Seeker».

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Luca is increasingly pressured by investors and receives unexpected help from Adelaide. Silvia threatens to ruin Umberto if he doesn't force Riccardo to marry Nicoletta.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: The Mystery of Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike navigate their engagement and balance their demanding careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur and Lale go on a blind date arranged by their mothers and wake up the next morning in the same bed.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Leyla decides to stay and face everyone, while Ender tries to prevent the tragedy without success. At the same time, Kaya brings Sahika back, triggering a new conflict in the house.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: Marianne celebrates her 21st birthday. Both Sandokan and Brooke are invited to the dance. There is some tension between the three, but Sandokan must first free Yanez and his crew.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Farah's abandonment affects Francesco greatly; feeling a complete lack of trust, he also moves away from Viola. He wants to be a free man again, and he tells her frankly, which hurts her.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Ezgi and Özgür do everything they can to make Nevim, Sevim and Ünal oppose their engagement. Sevent throws Cansu into the sea. Ezgi and Özgür return to Istanbul and face normal life.

programme.title: Quarto 309
programme.desc: Onur and Lale go on a blind date arranged by their mothers and wake up the next morning in the same bed.

programme.title: I love you to death
programme.desc: The symbiotic relationship between mother Camile, who suffers from Munchausen syndrome, and her daughter Esme ends tragically when Esme discovers the truth about her true physical condition.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Leyla decides to stay and face everyone, while Ender tries to prevent the tragedy without success. At the same time, Kaya brings Sahika back, triggering a new conflict in the house.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: As Shaun discovers a surprising truth about Lea, the team at St. Bonaventure treats two patients with complicated personal lives.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: As Shaun prepares to meet Lea's parents, the St. Bonaventure team treats an elite gymnast and her coach - who also happens to be her father.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Leyla decides to stay and face everyone, while Ender tries to prevent the tragedy without success. At the same time, Kaya brings Sahika back, triggering a new conflict in the house.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Yildiz asks Nadir for help to get rid of Leyla, while Ender tries to maintain control inside the house. At the same time, Zerrin's arrival triggers new family tensions.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: Why complicate things when you can keep having fun every night at the club? That seems to be the motto of three friends: Christina, Courtney and Jane. Until one night Christina meets the ideal man who then disappears.

programme.title: Lemonade Stand Romance
programme.desc: When a girl's lemonade stand is closed due to an outdated statutory law, it's not just the locals who have a say in the case, the media does too.

programme.title: Cross-fire
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of a store owner and his son, firefighter Jeremy Coleman miraculously escapes with his life. Having witnessed the murders and being forced to testify against the gang of gangsters that carried them out, specifically against their leader, David Hagan, he is integrated into the witness protection program under the supervision of the Marshalls. Agent Talia will be in charge of protecting Jeremy's life from this cruel murderer. Inspector Mike Calla will be in charge of handling Coleman's case, a man who precisely lost his wife at the hands of the same gangster who committed this crime, and who since then has not stopped searching for him to do justice. The problem comes when Jeremy Coleman's new identity is compromised, so the firefighter is forced to take action to recover his life and save those of his loved ones.

programme.title: Llamaradas
programme.desc: He was a child when he witnessed the death of his father in an act of service during a fire. Twenty years later, Brian is also a firefighter in Chicago. He is in a difficult trial period led by his brother Stephen who is very demanding of him. Both brothers will try to overcome disputes and memories of the past while an arsonist sets fires in the city.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Flower Shop Mystery: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: A former lawyer turned florist is involved in a murder that is connected to a hit-and-run accident. To survive, you must discover the culprit before you become the next victim.

programme.title: Conan the destroyer
programme.desc: Queen Taramis entrusts Conan with a very dangerous mission: to accompany Princess Jehnna on a long journey for which she was born predestined. Their objective is to recover a jewel that is in the possession of a powerful sorcerer. If he succeeds, the queen promises that she will help him recover Valeria, his great love. But the monarch's intentions are very different since with the jewel she wants to bring an ancient god back to life.

programme.title: extreme chase
programme.desc: John Triton is a Marine returning home after being discharged from the Iraq War. Already in the United States, he has to take action again when his wife is kidnapped by a bloodthirsty mafia gang led by the cruel Rome. With everything at stake, John will not stop until he completes his toughest and most important mission.

programme.title: A winter on the beach
programme.desc: A writer lives with an obsession: his ex-wife, who eloped with another man years ago. Her problems cause her a literary block while her neighbor tries to get her to see life in a different way. The daughter and son of the protagonist also try to open a literary career.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: Diablo (A Man Apart)
programme.desc: Two DEA agents, Sean Vetter and his partner Demetrius Hicks, have been working for years on the border between Mexico and the United States trying to send the famous boss of the Baja California cartel, Momo Lucero, to prison. When they finally succeed, Vetter is ready to enjoy a well-deserved rest by returning home to his wife Stacy. But after Lucero's arrest, a mysterious man known as 'Diablo' enters the scene and proclaims himself the new leader of the cartel and once he takes control of operations, a mysterious figure causes the death of Vetter's wife. Destroyed and with nothing to lose, he is determined to seek revenge, so from that moment on he will dedicate all his efforts to ending Diablo, even if to do so he has to reach an agreement with Lucero or face his own companions.

programme.title: Zooloco
programme.desc: The animals at Franklin Park Zoo adore their kind keeper, Griffin Keyes. When Griffin realizes that he is more comfortable with a lion than a lady, he decides that the only way to get a girl to share his life is to leave the zoo and look for a more glamorous job.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker was abandoned by his parents when he was still a child, and was raised by his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. Somewhat marginalized at school, Peter wants to know his past and find out who he is, but there he meets his first love, Gwen Stacy. When Peter discovers a briefcase that belonged to his father, he begins a quest to learn how his parents disappeared, something that will take him to Oscorp and the laboratory of his father's former partner, Dr. Connor, where he is bitten by an experimentally modified spider that gives him incredible powers. The murder of his uncle by a thief will make him seek revenge, catching the criminals he finds in his path, so he realizes that his destiny is to help people. But Dr. Connor, in turn, is forced to test his own experiment (a lizard serum that regenerates body limbs) on himself after his dismissal, which turns him into The Lizard. This will spread panic among the citizens, and Peter will be forced to use his powers. It is the first film of a cinematographic reboot of this character, since due to script problems Sony had canceled the fourth installment of Spider-Man, opting for this reboot. Marc Webb is in charge of directing the film, and he specializes in the world of music videos, in which groups such as Green Day, My Chemical Romance, Evanescence, Maroon 5 and Fergie have featured him. His only films are (500) Days Together and the first and second installment of this new Spider-Man saga. Andrew Garfield plays Peter Parker. He began in theater and acted in Leones por Corderos and the television film Boy A, which gave him recognition; just like his performance in The Social Network. Emma Stone plays Gwen Stacy, and participated in films such as Campus Bunny, Ghosts of My Ex-Girlfriends, Crazy, Stupid, Love or Entitled to Friction. His role in Easy A earned him a Golden Globe nomination.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2: El poder de Electro
programme.desc: Peter Parker leads a very busy life: he has to save the city from bad guys and also continue with his university life to take care of Gwen, although from a distance. Things get complicated when the villain Electro appears with a thirst for revenge. However, it won't be the only thing Peter has to face, as the return of an old friend, Harry Osborn, brings new clues about his past.

programme.title: A town called Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Harry Dalton (Pierce Brosnan) is one of the most renowned volcanologists at the United States Geological Survey. Four years after his partner's death during a volcanic eruption in Colombia, Harry receives a call from his boss, Paul Dyfrus (Charles Hallahan), to discuss the unusual behavior of a hitherto dormant volcano. Meanwhile, the city of Dante's Peak, located on one of the volcano's plains, is celebrating being named the second most desirable place to live in the country. Harry begins his investigation in the area and discovers clear signs that the volcano could soon erupt. The scientist wants to put the city on alert, but the inhabitants have economic interests that could be harmed if they heed Harry's warnings. Everyone ignores it until it's too late. The director, Roger Donaldson, was drawn to the project because he was once a geology student. Many of the film's special effects were done practically. The ash from the volcano was actually very fine shavings of newspaper. According to an interview with Donaldson, the camera that Harry Dalton uses during his investigation is actually owned by Pierce Brosnan. Initially the main role was going to be played by Michael Douglas. Most of the film's exteriors were shot in Wallas, Idaho. It was also filmed on Dante's Peak, adding certain details with digital technology.

programme.title: The general's daughter
programme.desc: Officer Paul Brenner was investigating a dark case of corruption in the United States Army when Captain Elizabeth Campbell, daughter of the legendary General Joe Campbell, is violently murdered under strange conditions. His magnificent record and the excellent professional relationships that united him with the rest of the troops immediately direct the investigation towards a personal motive as the motive for the crime, something that, in Elizabeth's case, makes the authorities of the army's criminal investigation division fear the worst.

programme.title: the ghostbusters
programme.desc: Dr. Peter Venkman (Bill Murray) takes advantage of his research scholarship at the University to torture boys and conquer girls who take psychosensory tests. He is actually a very capable scientist who resorts to logic rather than superstition, but he uses the girls' gullibility to flirt with them. His friends, Dr. Raymond Stantz (Dan Aykroyd) and Dr. Egon Spengler (Harold Ramis), carry out ectoplasmic studies to investigate the possible existence of ghosts and even capture one for later study. The first time they have a warning about the real presence of a ghost in a library, they don't know how to deal with it and run away. It is after they are kicked out of the University that they decide to mortgage Stantz's house and start their own ghost hunting company. Over time they manage to develop machines that trap ectoplasmic beings for later study. But the jobs that come to the office are nonsense with what is about to fall on them. A young woman who lives alone begins to have truly shocking paranormal experiences in her home and decides to call the Ghostbusters to help her. The investigation will take them further than they ever thought they would go, seeing things they would never have dreamed of seeing. In Aykroyd's original script, the story took place in a future where there would be teams of ghostbusters like there are today of paramedics or firefighters. But the budget studied for that type of film amounted to three hundred million dollars and Aykroyd was forced to adapt it to the scientific reality of the 1980s. Initially other actors were going to play some of the most important roles in the film: John Candy was going to be Louis Tully, John Belushi was going to be Dr. Peter Venkman, and the role of Winston was written specifically for Eddie Murphy.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Llamaradas
programme.desc: He was a child when he witnessed the death of his father in an act of service during a fire. Twenty years later, Brian is also a firefighter in Chicago. He is in a difficult trial period led by his brother Stephen who is very demanding of him. Both brothers will try to overcome disputes and memories of the past while an arsonist sets fires in the city.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: Dr. Franks is a prestigious neurosurgeon who is going to carry out a unique and very dangerous operation: implant the memories, secrets and abilities of CIA agent Bill Pope who has just died in the mind of another person. This is a cutting-edge method that is presented as the only way the agency has to recover confidential information of vital importance from Pope's memory that compromises the national security of the United States. The problem is that the only candidate to become the vessel of the deceased's mind is Jericho Stewart, a dangerous and unpredictable convict who is on death row awaiting execution and who has a brain abnormality that makes him perfect for the mission. However, no one can assure that the result is the most effective way to stop a terrible conspiracy that is hanging over the country.

programme.title: Crank: High voltage
programme.desc: Hitman Chelios faces off against a Chinese gangster who has stolen his virtually indestructible heart and replaced it with a sophisticated battery-powered device that requires frequent bursts of electricity to continue functioning.

programme.title: Time to kill
programme.desc: In a quiet southern town in Mississippi, two drunk young men savagely rape a 10-year-old black girl. The white majority of the city is horrified by such a heinous crime, until Carl Lee, Tonya's father, armed with an assault rifle, decides to take justice into his own hands and kills his daughter's rapists. For ten days, as tension grows and the burning crosses of the Ku Klux Klan reappear on the streets of Clanton, Jake Brigance, a young white lawyer, will do everything possible to save Carl Lee's life while trying not to lose his own.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest. After seeing the situation of lack of control among the sailors, the captain insists on returning to the boat to continue his trip. However, the second in command, Fletcher Christian, will support his men.

programme.title: The Blind Side (Un sueño posible)
programme.desc: A young homeless African-American finds refuge in a white family, who will support him in his desire to become an American football player. Based on true events, the film tells the story of Michael Oher (Quinton Aaron), a teenager who tries to survive on his own, practically "homeless" until Leigh Anne Tuohy (Sandra Bullock) finds him on the street. Upon discovering that he is his daughter's classmate, he decides to take him home. Little by little, Michael will become part of the family. Sandra Bullock won an Oscar for best actress for her performance and the film was a success at the American box office.

programme.title: Moneyball, breaking the rules
programme.desc: The Oakland Athletics just lost again to the New York Yankees in the 2001 post-season. With their main stars, Johnny Damon, Jason Giambi and Jason Isringhausen leaving for another team, it will be the responsibility of their manager, Billy Beane, to find a solution. On a visit to Cleveland, Beane will meet Peter Brand, a young economics specialist from Yale who has a series of radical ideas about how to enhance the value of each player. As proof that he is right, Peter gives him the keys to why Billy failed when he played in the professional league. Convinced that what he says is true, the manager decides to hire him to completely turn his team around. But this new statistical method provokes terrible controversy. The players don't believe in him and neither do the team's shareholders. Instead of relying on each person's experience, character, or intuition, Billy ranks them based on their base percentage (OBP). Thus, he hires players with a very high OBP but with a series of characteristics that terribly undervalue them: one cannot run, another is too old... But the confrontation and controversy are too broad and now Beane will have to face a losing and demoralized team, an overexcited Peter, the team managers who do not believe in him and an entire country that believes that you cannot play that way. During pre-production on Moneyball, cinematographer Adam Kimmel was arrested for crimes related to sexual harassment and possession of illegal weapons and explosives. He was replaced by Wally Pfister. This is the first movie about baseball to be nominated for an Oscar since "Field of Dreams," twenty-two years earlier. In the film, Billy Beane refers to John Poloni as "Rocco." This is a reference to Jack McGee's father, who played in minor league baseball and whose nickname was "Rocco."

programme.title: Terminator Salvation
programme.desc: Year 2018. Judgment Day has passed and has devastated modern civilization. An army of Terminators roams the Earth to capture and kill all those humans who have survived. The few that remain have organized themselves and hide in bunkers creating what they call "The Resistance" to combat the robots when they have the chance even though they are outnumbered. The Terminators are controlled by Skynet, an artificial intelligence network that was created 14 years earlier by the government, but which turned against them, and which wants to cause nuclear annihilation. Only one man can stop it, John Connor. He has been taught his entire life for this moment by his mother, Sarah Connor, who already knew what was going to happen, but something that was not in her plans makes him doubt what he has known so far. The appearance of Marcus Wright, a stranger who comes from the past and whose last memory is of being on death row, and who also insists on having been with Kyle Reese, John's father. What John does not know is that Marcus, in 2003, had donated his organs and brain to the Cyberdyne company before being executed, and that with this they created a special Terminator who was left with his heart and biological brain. John must decide whether to trust Marcus as the Resistance prepares its final attack on the Terminators, which will take place at Skynet's base of operations.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Sweet Molly Wright has a life-changing experience as a child; Help an alien who is being sought by two agents of the MiB organization escape. Twenty years after what happened, and after much physical and intellectual preparation, she manages to present herself as a candidate to join the CIA and the FBI, but no one believes her story and she is rejected for her delusions with alien life. Despite this, Molly does not give up and manages to track down an alien landing that leads her directly to the MiB headquarters in New York City. His adventure begins from that moment, he leaves life as he knows it behind and becomes a testing agent for the MiB branch in the city of London. The tenacious and cunning Molly has to prove her abilities to stay in the MiB. To do this, he manages to get involved in a difficult mission as the assistant of the presumptuous Agent H. Both agents will have to iron out their rough edges and work as a team to solve two serious problems; the appearance of a mole that would call into question the impeccable reputation of the MiB and the threat of two alien beings that endangers life on Earth and the balance of the universe. Men in Black: International is a new installment of the famous Men in Black franchise. It becomes the fourth film and spin-off of the original MIB saga. It stars Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson and much of its filming took place in the cities of New York, Morocco, Italy and London. The actor and producer Felix Gary Gray was in charge of directing this film.

According to the Mayan calendar, the year 2012 is set as the date of the end of the world. This end of the world will bring different natural disasters, volcanoes will erupt, there will be major floods, typhoons... Jackson Curtis (John Cusack) is a writer of science fiction stories who also works as a driver for a Russian millionaire. Jackson is divorced and has two children, Lilly (Morgan Lily) and Noah (Liam James) who live with his ex-wife's boyfriend. One day, when Jackson and his children return home they find that great seismic activity is affecting the entire West Coast of the United States. Suddenly the Curtis family will find themselves immersed in a fight to survive what could be the end of the world. Actor John Cusack, known for his performance in films such as '1408' (2007), 'High Fidelity' (2000) and 'How to Be John Malkovich' (1999), stars in this feature film about the consequences of the end of the world that the Mayans predicted would happen in 2012. Its director, Roland Emmerich, specialized in action films and apocalyptic and disaster films, confirmed the film's completion. of a television series, a sequel to the feature film, which would be based on the survivors of the disaster. An alternative ending to the film was also included in some versions of the DVD marketed in different countries. For its promotion, a trailer was used in which you could see how a tsunami threatened the Himalayas, ending with the phrase 'The governments of the world did not prepare the people for the end of the world, find out the truth.' The page of the fictitious organization 'Institute for Human Continuity' was also launched, thus beginning an important viral marketing strategy.

programme.title: Cross-fire
programme.desc: After witnessing the brutal murder of a store owner and his son, firefighter Jeremy Coleman miraculously escapes with his life. Having witnessed the murders and being forced to testify against the gang of gangsters that carried them out, specifically against their leader, David Hagan, he is integrated into the witness protection program under the supervision of the Marshalls. Agent Talia will be in charge of protecting Jeremy's life from this cruel murderer. Inspector Mike Calla will be in charge of handling Coleman's case, a man who precisely lost his wife at the hands of the same gangster who committed this crime, and who since then has not stopped searching for him to do justice. The problem comes when Jeremy Coleman's new identity is compromised, so the firefighter is forced to take action to recover his life and save those of his loved ones.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: The Ghostbusters discover that New York is once again headed toward supernatural disaster, with a river of ectoplasmic matter running beneath the city and an old sorcerer attempting to take possession of a baby. to be born again.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Texas. Two years before the American Civil War broke out. King Schultz is a German bounty hunter who is tracking murderers to collect for their heads, and he promises the black slave Django to set him free on the condition that he helps him catch them. Django accepts, since his greatest wish is to go rescue his wife Broomhilda, a slave who is on the plantation of landowner Calvin Candie. This film, written and directed by Quentin Tarantino, is a western film with references to the spaghetti western genre; genre through which I wanted to portray a story about slavery like this one. Tarantino is a renowned American director, producer and screenwriter whose films are characterized by addressing non-linear stories, violence, Grindhouse influences, kung fu and spaghetti westerns. Starring Jamie Foxx ('Bait', 'Collateral'), Christoph Waltz ('Inglourious Basterds', 'Dorian'), Leonardo DiCaprio ('Titanic', 'The Great Gatsby') and Samuel L. Jackson ('S.W.A.T.', 'Star Wars'); The film is a mix of good dialogue, rhythm, irony, and an impeccable soundtrack that captures the viewer's attention at all times.

programme.title: damn bastards
programme.desc: With France occupied by the Nazis, a young Jewish woman witnesses the cruel murder of her parents by the expert Jew hunter Colonel Hans Landa. Barely escaping to save her life, she begins to plot revenge when years later a German war hero becomes interested in her and decides to premiere a film dedicated to her in his theater, which will be attended by great Nazi officers. This premiere catches the attention of "The Bastards", a group of Jewish-American soldiers led by Captain Aldo Raine. When the plans of this group of ruthless avengers and the young Jewish girl's conspiracy are put into motion, their paths will meet during an afternoon that will forever change the course of history. Although 30% of the film is originally spoken in English, the predominant languages ​​throughout the film are French and German, and a bit of Italian. In chapter three of the film "German Night in Paris" there is not a single sentence in English, something totally unusual in a Hollywood production.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: Men in Black: The men in black
programme.desc: The Men in Black are agents who work for the government on a secret mission that consists of monitoring aliens living on our planet without us knowing. James Edwards (Will Smith), a police officer, and Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones), one of the Men in Black, discover that an alien terrorist intends to destroy Earth. James and Agent K will try to destroy these aliens and prevent humanity from being destroyed. In this film, Barry Sonnenfeld adapts the story of the same name by Lowell Cunningham, which refers to these supposed men in charge of hiding the existence of extraterrestrial life in various conspiracy theories. Sonnenfeld is known for films such as "Wild Wild West" (1999) and "The Adams Family" (1991). He began working for the Coen brothers as a director of photography but soon began making his own films. Originally "Men in Black" was offered to director Quentin Tarantino, who declined to participate in the project, as did Clint Eastwood, who was offered the role of Agent K. The film has several sequels directed by Sonnenfeld. The first feature film in the saga received positive reviews, something that the second installment did not achieve despite all of them being a great success at the box office. The film has three Oscar nominations, from which it won a statuette, and was also nominated for the Golden Gobles. The music, composed by Danny Elfman, caused the film "Men in Black" to be included in the American Film Institute's "100 Years&100 songs" list.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: MI6 agent Ray Koval (Clive Owen) is in Dubai when he meets Claire Stenwick (Julia Roberts). After groping her a little, he manages to win her over and they spend the night together, without knowing that Claire is part of the CIA. When Ray wakes up the next day, the woman has disappeared with several compromised documents. For years, Ray searches for her, leaves his job at MI6 and gets a new one in the espionage department of a large multinational. In his third week of work he meets Claire again. Now they both work as spies for large companies and Claire is not willing to allow anyone to come and destroy the professional future she has been building for just over a year. The two spies will use all kinds of tricks to keep their positions, but they will also have to fight against the great attraction they feel for each other so as not to succumb to the other person's deceptions. In this film, actor Clive Owen plays MI6 spy Ray Koval. Owen began his career in television, working mainly on not very well-known series. Currently, although he still makes some stellar appearances on television, he is one of the best-known faces on the big screen. He has worked in films such as 'The Bourne Affair', 'King Arthur' and 'Closer' where he shares the bill for the first time with actress Julia Roberts. In 'Duplicity', Roberts plays Claire Stenwick, a retired CIA agent. The acclaimed actress began her career in 1987, in the series 'The History of Crime'. After that she worked in several films until she became famous with 'Pretty Woman' and her starring role alongside actor Richard Gere. From there her career took off and her charming smile made her 'America's Sweetheart'. He played several leading roles in romantic comedies but he has always tried to combine it with more serious roles such as those he played in 'Stay by me' or 'Erin Brockovich'.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: big kids 2
programme.desc: After the pleasant experience he had three summers ago, Lenny (Adam Sandler) decides to move with his family to his hometown, where he hopes to raise his children just as he was raised. His best friends are waiting for him there, who also live there with their families. But the four friends, reunited again, cannot stay for long without getting into trouble. And what was expected to be a change for the better in the lives of their children ends up becoming an opportunity for parents to live new and exciting adventures. Together they will face the new bullies in town, reconnect with the old ones, and be victims of harassment from all the people who meant something to them in primary school. Second part of the comedy of the same name released in 2010, starring four of the best-known comic faces on the international scene and in North American cinema: Adam Sandler ('Dad Cool', 'Billy Madison'), Kevin James ('The King of Queens', 'Hitch'), Chris Rock ('From Incompetent to President') and David Spade ('Give Me a Break', 'Rules of Engagement'). This is the first sequel filmed by actor Adam Sandler, he also wrote the script for this film and the first part. He wrote both scripts with Fred Wolf, one of the writers of the comedy show 'Saturday Night Live'.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

Franchesca Hashemi explains what you need to know about the lithium-ion batteries in the tech you use every day. And Nick Kwek meets the tech entrepreneur trying to decode animal language.

Jodoh Di Ujung Jari
programme.desc: Rio, cowok tampan playboy kampus, banyak cewek-cewek terpikat oleh Rio. Rio punya empat pacar dan harus bisa mengatur waktu dengan keempat pacarnya. Apakah akan berjalan dengan mulus?

programme.title: Kr. Amat Tikar Rogosukmo Shop
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat Bantal Mimpi Indah
programme.desc: Marina mendapatkan bantal dari toko KR. Amat. Bantal ini punya khasiat jika digunakan saat tidur maka waktu bisa diputar kembali. Segala sesuatu yang menyangkut masa lalu dapat terulang kembali dan apapun yang diinginkan terwujud

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 5
programme.desc: Mada dan kawan-kawan sangat optimis akan memenangkan pertandingan ini dari Tim Malaysia, juara bertahan empat tahun berturut-turut. Saksikanlah pertandingan silat antara Tim Indonesia melawan Tim Malaysia!

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Sabuk Penghilang Raga
programme.desc: Raga, maling kelas teri yang bernasib sial. Saat dikejar para warga dan bersembunyi di dalam sebuah kali, tiba-tiba Raga menemukan sebuah koin gobang yang hanyut. Saat Raga menggenggam koin itu, tiba-tiba saja ia menghilang.

programme.title: Factory Cinta
programme.desc: Karin melaksanakan tugas KKN di sebuah desa terpencil selama dua minggu. Merasa bosan, dia dan sahabatnya, Dinda, pergi ke kota untuk berbelanja tapi justru kemalingan dan tersesat. Lalu, Aman datang menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Cintaku Di Kejar Cicilan
programme.desc: Andre adalah pria tampan yang selalu bergaya dengan barang-barang mewah. Namun, semua itu dibeli Andre dengan berutang, akhirnya dia pun dikejar cicilan yang menumpuk.

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Kembalikan Tubuhku
programme.desc: Dinda dan Marsya mengalami sebuah kecelakaan. Kejadian ini membuat Marsya dan Dinda bertukar tubuh. Dinda masuk ke tubuh Marsya dan menggunakan tubuhnya. Namun justru permasalahan baru dimulai. Bagaimanakah kisah mereka?

programme.title: Sweet Martabak Buat Kamu Yang Manis
programme.desc: Kenang, cowok manis penjual martabak yang bikin cewek-cewek kepincut ini memang jago meracik martabak. Namun mengapa kenang dan Jingga kerap berseteru?

programme.title: Kabayan Mencari Cinta
programme.desc: Sosok legendaris tanah Sunda, Kabayan, kembali hadir. Kali ini, dia bertekad untuk melengkapi kehidupan asmaranya: ia mencari cinta!

programme.title: Cinta Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Rara yang culas dan ambisius kecewa ketika Sari terpilih sebagai pewaris utama Prabu. Rara bersekongkol dengan Indra untuk menyingkirkan Sari dengan memberinya ramuan yang membuat kulitnya bersisik dan bersembunyi di hutan.

programme.title: Pejantan Tanggung 02
programme.desc: Akhirnya keempat sahabat ini kembali bersatu dan melupakan kejadian di masa lalu. Ketika mereka saling terbuka tentang perasaan mereka, persahabatan mereka pun dipertaruhkan.

programme.title: Kecantol Derek Cinta
programme.desc: Mona dan Ryan dipertemukan karena derek mobil, atau lebih tepatnya karena mobilnya diderek oleh Ryan karena melanggar peraturan parkir. Apa kisah mereka hanya sampai di sini?

programme.title: Kecantol Derek Cinta
programme.desc: Mona dan Ryan dipertemukan karena derek mobil, atau lebih tepatnya karena mobilnya diderek oleh Ryan karena melanggar peraturan parkir. Apa kisah mereka hanya sampai di sini?

programme.title: Call Of The Sea
programme.desc: Seorang nelayan muda bernama Chin Hu jatuh cinta dengan teman masa kecilnya, Hsiao Yu. Namun, putra satu-satunya preman di sana terpukau pada kecantikan Hsiao Yu dan mencoba segala cara untuk mendekatinya.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: The Water Margin karya sutradara Chang Cheh merupakan film seni bela diri paling epik, diangkat dari legenda nyata tentang 108 pemberontak yang hidup di gunung dan mampu berkali-kali mengalahkan serbuan tentara Sung.

programme.title: The Adulteress
programme.desc: Pada masa kemunduran Dinasti Ching, putra dari hakim lokal membunuh seorang pedagang keliling dan memperkosa istrinya. Sang istri dijebak atas pembunuhan suaminya oleh sang pemerkosa.

programme.title: Twin Blades Of Doom
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pendekar terpaksa kembali beraksi setelah keluarganya dibunuh oleh Geng Hantu yang kejam. Tanpa teman, ia harus menghadapi kelima pembunuh seorang diri.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: The Land Of Many Perfumes
programme.desc: Biksu Tang San Zang, siluman kera, siluman babi, dan Sha Wu Jing berada di Womanland, tempat para wanita melahirkan bayi perempuan dengan meminum mata air ajaib.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan adalah seorang pemuda cerdas dari keluarga berada. Ia telah mengalahkan semua penduduk di kotanya dan memutuskan untuk menaklukkan Tiga Pemuda Cerdas dari Utara.

programme.title: Empress Wu
programme.desc: Wu Ze Tian adalah seorang selir Kaisar Tang yang berusia 14 tahun nan cantik dan berbakat. Ia menjadi biarawati usai sang kaisar meninggal, tapi ia memiliki dua putra dengan Kaisar Tang Gao Zong.

programme.title: Rendezvous With Death
programme.desc: Disutradarai oleh Sun Chung, seorang sutradara berbakat, film ini berkisah tentang seorang ahli pedang yang melindungi sebuah peti harta karun dalam sebuah perjalanan yang berbahaya.

programme.title: The Monkey Goes West
programme.desc: Film mengesankan yang diangkat dari kisah klasik Perjalanan Ke Barat ini menampilkan interpretasi nan unik yang dibumbui dengan humor, aksi laga dan kisah fantasi.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Aksi kepahlawanan dan kisah asmara mewarnai film seni bela diri klasik ini. Saat Shaolin dikhianati oleh Pertapa Alis Putih, Fong Sai Yuk sang prajurit pemarah bersumpah untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Pembunuh profesional Lui pergi ke Malaysia setelah melaksanakan misinya membunuh seorang bos geng besar Hong Kong. Target selanjutnya adalah pengantin pria yang mengadakan pesta pernikahan di sebuah hotel di Pecinan.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang dan putri Jin yang bernama Peony sudah bertunangan sejak lahir, tetapi Jin menolak pertunangan tersebut. Kemudian, Zhang bertemu dengan sesosok roh yang terlihat persis seperti Peony dan mereka jatuh cinta.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: David Chiang menjadi tokoh budiman yang menolong pendekar pedang tak bersalah yang dipenjara karena dituduh mencuri. Bersama mereka mendobrak penjara dan menggertak para penjahat.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: David Chiang menjadi tokoh budiman yang menolong pendekar pedang tak bersalah yang dipenjara karena dituduh mencuri. Bersama mereka mendobrak penjara dan menggertak para penjahat.

programme.title: Passing Flickers
programme.desc: Kisah nyata tentang industri film Hong Kong yang disutradarai oleh Li Han Hsiang ini menggambarkan saat-saat paling menyenangkan dan paling aktual di suatu era seperti yang dimuat dalam kolom gosip surat kabar.

programme.title: Killer Darts
programme.desc: Sekawanan bandit brutal memperkosa dan menjarah di desa-desa Tiongkok. Liu Wen, ahli panah yang tengah berduka, beraksi bersama murid, anak, dan pelayannya guna membalas kematian istrinya dan mengembalikan kedamaian.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: Kisah cinta antara sesosok peri nan memikat yang turun dari surga untuk menjalani kehidupan di Hong Kong pada tahun 70-an dengan seorang pria yang mengelola sebuah panti asuhan yang terlilit hutang.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Danny Lee berperan sebagai pria yang dikira sebagai pengungsi dan dibuntuti oleh seorang polisi jujur dalam film kejahatan menarik asal Tiongkok-Vietnam arahan aktor yang kini menjadi sutradara, Wang Chung.

programme.title: Scandal
programme.desc: Saat berandalan Zhen dan sahabatnya Chia mengumpulkan bukti-bukti korupsi para pejabat, mereka menuntut untuk menjadi gubernur di negara itu.

programme.title: The Lady Professional
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai wanita penggoda dalam film thriller kontemporer Shaw Brothers ini. Berlatar di Hong Kong dan Jepang, film ini bercerita tentang Ho yang menyadari jika dirinya menjadi target pembunuhan.

programme.title: The Cave Of Silken Web
programme.desc: Bagian ke-3 dari film Journey To The West produksi Shaw Brothers ini mengikuti perjuangan para jagoan kita saat dijebak oleh 7 siluman laba-laba penggoda, yang bertekad untuk meraih keabadian dengan memakan para biksu!

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Petinju Tai Chi nan hebat, Ku Ting, menyembunyikan keahliannya dengan bekerja sebagai pekerja konstruksi. Namun, saat para preman menyerang kekasihnya, ia akhirnya menggunakan kung fu guna mengalahkan musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: A Maid From Heaven
programme.desc: Sebagai hukuman atas perilaku buruknya, putri Kaisar Jade yang ke-tujuh diusir dari surga dan dikirim untuk tinggal bersama manusia. Di sana, ia jatuh cinta dengan seorang pemuda desa bernama Dong Young.

programme.title: Swordswomen Three
programme.desc: Pada awal tiga dekade, Shen Yi, Essie Lin Chia, dan Pan Ying-tzu menampilkan superstar internasional Shaw yang pertama, Lo Lieh untuk Han Family Sword memberikan suguhan bintang empat untuk penggemar film laga ini.

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Seorang playboy kaya tewas akibat diledakkan oleh seorang gangster ketika ia menggoda istri gangster tersebut. Melalui serangkaian kejadian, profesornya membuatkan tubuh sintetis yang memungkinkannya untuk berubah menjadi apa pun yang diinginkannya.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Perfect Girls
programme.desc: Chi akan mewarisi kekayaan kakeknya yang tengah sekarat dengan satu syarat, yaitu ia harus menikah dalam waktu sebulan. Jika tidak, warisan tersebut akan diberikan kepada sang paman yang bernama Robert.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 2
programme.desc: Cho yang multitalenta ingin belajar dari Dewa Judi dan menghubungi muridnya. Mereka diserang oleh seorang bos kriminal yang berencana menyalahgunakan nama baik Dewa Judi untuk menghasilkan jutaan.

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: Stephen Chow berangkat ke kota besar untuk mencoba menyelamatkan rumahnya dengan memenangkan turnamen snooker besar.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: Seorang pria tunanetra, You Ji Ren, bekerja di sebuah pabrik di pulau terpencil. Karena badai, pabrik itu terisolasi dan muncul sesosok monster yang membuat siapa pun berubah menjadi bayangan hitam jika melihatnya.

programme.title: Girl With The Diamond Slipper
programme.desc: Lily, adalah seorang gadis biasa yang menjalani kehidupan sederhana. Suatu hari, dalam sebuah pasar antik, dia menemukan sepasang sepatu kaca berlian yang indah. Tanpa disangka, sepatu ini ternyata memiliki kekuatan magis yang dapat mewujudkan impian dan memberikan keberuntungan. Ketika Lily mencoba sepatu tersebut, dia segera menemukan bahwa hidupnya mulai berubah drastis. Dia mendapatkan pekerjaan impiannya, bertemu dengan orang-orang penting, dan bahkan menarik perhatian seorang pangeran modern yang tampan.

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun adalah seorang ahli bela diri terampil yang bertarung untuk membalas dendam atas kematian sang kekasih dengan bantuan dari seorang pemimpin geng pengemis.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda frustrasi yang menderita polio bekerja sebagai asisten hukum untuk seorang pengacara korup. Ia menerima teknik untuk mendapatkan kekuatan aneh dari seorang pria yang sekarat, yang mengubahnya menjadi pahlawan super/penjahat berbasis minyak.

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Valentino adalah penipu ulung yang bertemu dengan Kwan, sesama penipu. Bersama-sama, mereka menyamar sebagai berbagai orang dan menciptakan berbagai skema untuk menghasilkan uang. Sementara itu, para gangster sedang menyusun skema mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Sahabat baik Bodil dan Isabel, yang tampaknya telah menikah dengan bahagia, menyelinap pergi untuk melakukan perselingkuhan rahasia dengan menggunakan satu sama lain sebagai alibi. Namun, ketika Isabel terbunuh saat mereka seharusnya bersama. Bodil terjebak dalam jaringan kebohongannya sendiri.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Ma Wing Jing dan kakaknya, Ma Tai Chueng, tiba di Shanghai untuk mencari peruntungan. Berteman dengan seorang gangster berkuasa, ia diberi klub malam sebagai imbalan atas penyelamatan nyawa Tam Sei. Sayangnya, seorang gangster lain juga menginginkan wilayah tersebut.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: Putra dari keluarga kaya jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita yang hanya akan menikahinya setelah ia menjadi seorang Guru Kung-Fu. Dalam 'Drama Komedi' ini, ia menjadi pahlawan legendaris dengan berusaha menyelamatkan kaisar, dalam pencarian cintanya yang sebenarnya.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Leone's: Rose built her Italian restaurant in New Jersey into a thriving business, but when she spent two years in hospital, her son ran it into the ground. Can Gordon save it? (S5 Ep2) [S,SL]

programme.title: Jamie's One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie cooks his take on shakshuka with asparagus, broccoli and harissa, and an outrageously good pulled pork that can be batched up and used in loads of meals whenever you need it. (Ep6) [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Dover 24/7: Britain's Busiest Port
programme.desc: Border Force uncover a huge drug haul hidden in an HGV. Can singer Yungblud get through the port? And police race to an emergency on one of Dover’s busiest roads.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Dan and Nina want to build a unique family home, but their plot is dominated by a pond filled with local drainage. Will their West Sussex house be sublime and sleek or a Shrek-like swamp? [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two Dozen and One Greyhounds: Santa's Little Helper fathers a huge litter of puppies, so Mr Burns offers them a home. But Burns has always fancied a greyhound-fur tuxedo... (S6 Ep20/25) [AD,S]

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Veggie-Boyd: Woody gets a part in a TV advert for a healthy vegetable drink but is upset to discover that he doesn't like the product. Sam introduces trivia napkins at the bar. (S9 Ep9/25) [S]

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Halloween Candy: Debra thinks that it's Ray's turn to take charge of birth control, so he decides to have his 'wires cut', but then chickens out... (S3 Ep6) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Moving Out: Robert decides that he's too old to be living with his parents, so he moves in with another elderly couple - who turn out to be carbon copies of Frank and Marie. (S3 Ep7) [AD,S]

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Article: Ray's jealous when an inexperienced colleague beats him to his lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated. (S3 Ep8) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Ring Cycle: Niles and Daphne marry on an impulse while on holiday in Reno but are forced to hide their good news when they return to Seattle. (S10 Ep1) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Proxy Prexy: Frasier's attempts to become condominium president take a new turn when he persuades Martin to run as a 'puppet' candidate. (S10 Ep3) [AD,S]

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: The series that meets Britain's canal-dwellers. Lauren harvests lunch from her boat's roof garden, while Adam works on his book about life of the water. (S2 Ep1) [AD,S]

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie attempt to complete their tower stairwell before guests arrive. Ben and Billie are determined to preserve part of the chateau's history: a 50-year-old wine barrel. (S5 Ep11) [AD,S]

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul hosts the week's first visit at his seafront B&B, Hoopers Sandy Beach Guest Rooms in Swansea, where he's hoping stunning views and a watercolour masterclass will sail him to victory. [S]

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bristol, hairdresser Becky hopes to be a cut above the rest with her elegant soirée and 'extra' style of hosting. Can her tremendous tiramisu seal the deal? (Ep1/5) [S]

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather. [S]

programme.title: Dover 24/7: Britain's Busiest Port
programme.desc: At the ferry terminal, police officers chase a man spotted jumping out of a lorry. Border Force bust a cigarette-smuggling operation. And port crews try to dock an unwieldy Spanish galleon.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Decorator Philip has fallen 12 feet from a ladder. Liam flew off the back of a motorbike at high speed. And three-year-old Jonah has injured his elbow while playing with his mum.

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics treat a patient with an unusual stomach condition and a 10-year-old girl who's having an asthma attack and isn't responding to her usual medication. (S12 Ep5) [S]

programme.title: Dogtanian & The 3 Muskehounds
programme.desc: Dia segera berteman dengan tiga musketeer (Porthos, Athos, dan Aramis), serta menyelamatkan Juliette, seorang dayang Ratu Anne dari Austria.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: Rebound
programme.desc: Ribbit, seekor katak, merasa tidak puas dengan hidupnya. Ia bercita-cita menjadi pangeran tampan. Cara untuk mewujudkannya adalah dengan mendapatkan ciuman dari seorang putri. Ia pergi bersama pacarnya, Sandy, untuk mewujudkan keinginannya.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: School Of Magical Animals 3
programme.desc: Anak-anak dengan teman-teman hewan ajaib di Sekolah Winterstein mengalami petualangan yang mencakup hutan dan peragaan busana, bertemu kucing sombong dan buaya vegan sambil menjalin persahabatan dan cinta pertama.

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Little Crumb Race To Gold Mine
programme.desc: Setelah bertemu kembali dengan orang tuanya, Si Kecil kesulitan beradaptasi dengan gaya hidup mewahnya yang baru. Ketika ia diculik oleh musuh lama, ia harus memanfaatkan kehidupan baru dan lamanya untuk melarikan diri dan menyelamatkan orang tuanya.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: The Little Ghost
programme.desc: Si Hantu Kecil tinggal di kastil yang menghadap ke kota kecil dan terbangun tepat satu jam setelah jam menunjukkan tengah malam. Ikuti petualangannya untuk melihat matahari terbit pertamanya!

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: Owls & Mice
programme.desc: Meral (8) baru saja pindah ke sebuah kota baru. Ia berusaha mendapatkan teman di sekolah barunya sebelum perkemahan musim gugur sekolah dimulai, tetapi ternyata hal itu lebih sulit dari yang dibayangkannya. Di rumah, ia berteman dengan seekor tikus kecil yang tinggal di kamar barunya, yang ia beri nama Peepeep. Takut orang tuanya akan membunuh Peepeep saat ia pergi, Meral diam-diam membawanya ikut serta. Berkat tikus kecil itu, Meral mendapatkan beberapa teman baru yang tak terduga. Ketika seekor burung hantu menangkap tikus kecil tersebut, Meral menyalahkan teman-teman barunya. Baru setelah mereka bersama-sama pergi ke alam liar untuk mencari muntahan burung hantu yang berisi tulang-belulang Peepeep, Meral akhirnya memahami arti sebenarnya dari persahabatan. OWLS & MICE adalah sekuel dari FROGS & TOADS yang sukses dan memenangkan berbagai penghargaan, dari penulis dan sutradara yang sama, Simone van Dusseldorp.

programme.title: House Of Wonder
programme.desc: Dipandu dengan gaya yang menyenangkan dan penuh rasa ingin tahu, setiap episode menghadirkan inovasi desain rumah yang luar biasa sekaligus memberikan wawasan edukatif bagi seluruh keluarga.

programme.title: Days
programme.desc: Dua anak berteman dengan makhluk ajaib dan harus membantunya kembali ke rumah hutannya.

programme.title: Space Racers
programme.desc: Bergabunglah bersama para murid di Stardust Space Academy saat mereka menjalani berbagai misi untuk mempelajari fakta-fakta baru sambil bersenang-senang. Ditemani karakter-karakter yang menarik dan menyenangkan, termasuk pemimpin Space Racers dan Hawk.

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman sekolah menengah pertama pergi berburu harta karun setelah menemukan kerangka di hutan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: 73 Questions With Emily R.
programme.desc: Model dan aktris Emily Ratajkowski membuka pintu apartemen loft bergaya artistiknya di Los Angeles untuk sesi permainan catur, pesta mendengarkan piringan hitam, dan sesi menggambar dadakan.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Maisie Williams
programme.desc: Bintang Game of Thrones, Maisie Williams, bertekad untuk menikmati Paris Fashion Week sepenuhnya. Dengan mengenakan busana yang serasi bersama pacarnya, Reuben Selby, Maisie menghadiri peragaan busana Thom Browne dan Givenchy.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: Bandit
programme.desc: Setelah melarikan diri dari penjara Michigan, seorang penjahat karir yang menawan mengambil identitas baru di Kanada dan kemudian merampok 59 bank dan toko perhiasan sambil diburu oleh satuan tugas polisi. Berdasarkan kisah The Flying Bandit.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Infinitum Subject Unknown
programme.desc: Sebuah film eksperimental dibuat hanya dengan satu anggota kru. Jane terjebak di alam semesta paralel dan dipaksa untuk menemukan cara untuk mengubah realitasnya sebelum terlambat.

programme.desc: Ketika seorang profesor perguruan tinggi berhadapan dengan dua pemburu yang dia tangkap sedang memasuki propertinya tanpa izin, dia terlibat dalam pertarungan kemauan yang semakin sengit dengan konsekuensi yang sangat dahsyat.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: The Boxer And The Butterfly

Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Kuala S2 - Eps. 9

programme.title: Belajar Bahasa Inggris - Eps. 40

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world's largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will...
