programme.title: Subterfuge
programme.desc: Agar diperbolehkan oleh sang ayah untuk bisa tetap dekat dengan kedua anak gadisnya yang menjadi pujaan Doyok dan Kadir, kedua lelaki tersebut menunjukkan usahanya. Namun dengan cara yang asal-asalan.

programme.title: Sunan Kalijaga
programme.desc: Perjalanan seorang R M. Said menjadi Seorang Sunan Kalijaga, salah satu sunan dari sembilan sunan yang terkenal. Karena tabah dalam menjalani berbagai cobaan, maka Sang Mahakuasa memberinya "cahaya".

programme.title: Melodi Cinta Rhoma Irama
programme.desc: Rhoma jatuh cinta dengan Ricca dan sempat merencanakan pernikahan. Namun jalinan cinta mereka diganggu oleh Herman yang juga mencintai Ricca dan ingin menguasai harta ayah Ricca

programme.title: Baby Blues
programme.desc: Sepasang suami-istri, Andika dan Dinda tidak menyangka bahwa merawat bayi tidak semudah yang dibayangkan. Hal ini membuat Dinda mengalami sindrom baby blues yang kemudian memicu perdebatan dan pertengkaran.

programme.title: Warkop Pintar-Pintar Bodoh
programme.desc: Dono, Kasino, Indro dan Dorman jadi detektif swasta. Mereka kemudian terpecah menjadi dua kubu yang saling bersaing gara-gara ribut soal duit.

programme.title: Mangkujiwo
programme.desc: Awal mula lahirnya kuntilanak. Kanthi adalah perempuan biasa yang jadi korban perseteruan Brotoseno dan Cokrokusumo dalam memperebutkan pengaruh dan kekuasaan atas Loji Pusaka.

programme.title: Hantu Juga Selfie
programme.desc: Helsi meninggal karena selfie, ia meneror temen-teman semasa hidupnya ketika mereka melakukan selfie. Hal ini membuat teman-temanya ketakutan, apa lagi bukan hanya sosok Helsi yang ada dalam foto namun hantu-hantu kocak lainya

programme.title: Belahan Jiwa
programme.desc: Cerita tentang empat sahabat yang selalu setia bersama, dan ternyata mereka semua berhubungan dengan pria yang sama

programme.title: Perempuan-Perempuan Liar
programme.desc: Dua penagih hutang sinting, Dom dan Mino, tak sengaja bertemu perempuan gila, Mey dan Cindy. Dom dan Mino terjebak permainan gila Mey dan Cindy. Mereka membawa kabur Mey dari pernikahan

programme.title: Sang Pencerah
programme.desc: Sepulang dari Mekah, Darwis muda mengubah namanya menjadi Ahmad Dahlan. Seorang pemuda usia 21 tahun yang gelisah atas pelaksanaan syariat Islam yang melenceng ke arah sesat, Syirik dan Bid'ah.

programme.title: Cinta Tapi Beda
programme.desc: Sepasang kekasih yang berbeda keyakinan Diana dan Cahyo. Namun saat mereka mulai mencoba melanjutkan ke jenjang yang lebih serius, orang tua mereka sangat bertentangan dengan rencana ini.

programme.title: Hat-trick
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang turnamen futsal internasional. Kebetulan tahun ini diadakan di Indonesia, maka dicarilah pemain-pemain terbaik dari seulurh Indonesia untuk dididik dan diikutkan dalam turnamen ini.

programme.title: Wandering
programme.desc: Abimanyu membawa istrinya, Sofia dan kedua anak mereka serta adiknya Sheila untuk menetap di hotel peninggalan orangtua di lembah gunung ratusan kilometer dari Jakarta, setelah dinyatakan bangkrut oleh pengadilan.

programme.title: Setannya Kok Masih Ada
programme.desc: Dedi dan Beno yang bekerja di kamar mayat berkenalan dengan Maya. Maya yang baru saja kehilangan kakeknya mendapatkan warisan rumah berikut perkebunannya. Namun karena menemukan banyak keanehan di rumah itu

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Rounding up all the rumours about Madonna's new album; Disco legend Gloria Gaynor and Sydnie Christmas on teaming up for a new duet; and the latest on Prince Harry's UK visit.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A long-running daytime magazine show co-hosted by two presenters on weekdays since 1988, making it one of the longest-running daytime programmes in the history of British television. The award-winning show features news and topical items, interviews with celebrity guests, real-life stories and a range of features including a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle, showbiz news and more. Audience participation is encouraged with daily phone-in features and competitions and presenters are joined by a range of experts - some regulars and some guests - from chefs and style gurus to doctors and other health professionals who share their expert advice with viewers on various topics.

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Join the Loose Women panellists as they interview celebrity guests and discuss the day's most topical issues, from current affairs to celebrity gossip and the latest showbiz news. [S,HD]

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast. [S,HD]

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East. [S,HD]

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: Peterborough opens its doors to the Dickinson team. Emotions get the better of Tracey Thackery, it all gets a bit spooky with a wax mask for James Layte. [S,AD,HD]

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts as Sandra is given her opportunity to open the iconic red boxes - she might be tempted to accept an offer from the Banker in exchange for what might be inside her randomly-selected box or hold out until the end and be rewarded with the jackpot of 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Brazil v Japan
programme.desc: Live coverage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 match between Brazil and Japan at Houston Stadium. [S,AD,HD]

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is on track to uncover an intriguing yet puzzling case when the body of a sickly young girl is found in a railway siding in the middle of nowhere - the girl could be anyone, but the investigation soon turns up twists and turns that makes Vera question who this girl actually was. As a vulnerable young person with a serious health condition, it appears as if her weakened state has allowed someone to take advantage of her and her family's dynamic changed when she wasn't truly part of the family. In a tale of intrigue, betrayal and blurred lines, Vera's investigation questions the meaning of family, care, accountability and eroding trust where care might have come at a cost.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents. [S,HD]

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East. [S,HD]

programme.title: Unbelievable Moments Caught On Camera
programme.desc: Astonishing and seemingly-impossible scenes filmed by members of the public and narrated by award-winning actor Roger Allam - the people who recorded these stories and are sharing their memories of these once-in-a-lifetime experiences this time include a kayaker who found himself trapped behind a waterfall in Mexico, a barber who pulled a driver from a burning car in Las Vegas, a family who narrowly escaped a doomed ship in Greece, a student pilot who was forced to land her plane in Michigan without a front wheel, and world champion cyclist Gee Atherton recalling a fall from a mountain in Wales that nearly cost him his life.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: When Christopher's posh old schoolmates arrive for the National Debating Championships final, the Scouse lads fear losing him to his old world. Instead, the groups begin to bond until a drunken factory break-in, crashed forklift and night in the cells forces Christopher to confront where he belongs. In the debate final, Christopher delivers a personal argument about why people divide themselves and how belonging to two worlds can be a strength. Meanwhile, Anna's return fractures Aimee and Wayne's alliance when she offers a different version of the past, leaving Aimee torn between loyalty to her dad and the mum she never stopped missing. Lewis's redemption arc implodes when his public apology tour exposes more chaos than growth, forcing Kieron to stage an intervention.

programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night

programme.desc: Motsi Mabuse, Rob Delaney and Amber Rose Gill join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, trying to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for their chance to win £50,000 for charity.

programme.title: The Floor US

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: 2020 has been memorable for all the wrong reasons, so what better tonic than to take things back to the decadent 1920s! Chloe Sims and Diags have made plans for a vintage knees-up, but with COVID restrictions in play, they're splitting the guest list down the middle and throwing two rival gatherings - and the competition is on! With both determined to throw the best do, what's a little sabotage between friends, and with the opposing gatherings in full swing, will the besties manage to make it through the night without one another? Following Harry and Frankie's break-up, Chloe Brockett wasted no time in approaching Harry to check whether he was OK - now Frankie has heard that the chat was more flirtatious than friendly, and is devastated that Chloe would kick her while she's down. When the plot thickens further and Saff reveals that Chloe said she wants to get back with Harry, will it be the final straw for Frankie, and will tempers flare when Chloe stands her ground against Frankie?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. An Audrey Hepburn-inspired brunch leaves most of the women at odds, Mary and Meredith's friendship lands in a rocky place after a surprising conflict, Heather has lingering resentment over Palm Springs, Todd is disappointed in Bronwyn's behaviour, Angie makes an emotional confession to her dad, and Mary's concern for Robert Jr grows.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County

The ladies head to wine country for Heather's fundraising event with Family Equality, Jenn has a court date to determine her financial future, the group navigate supporting Shannon and Alexis during a lawsuit deadline, and Shannon finds out about the video from the night of her DUI and confesses shocking details about her accident.

This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster breathes his last surrounded by his wife Hermione, his daughter Rose, and Rose's partner Craig Coffley - Dr Isaac Vernon confirms the death as Gregory's son, Antarctic expedition leader Felix, arrives just too late to see his father. Undertakers Caleb Southwood and Ellie Loxley go to the body only to discover that it has gone missing - when the Barnabys and Betty see Nelson arrive with the news, Barnaby and Nelson find new pathologist Kam Karimore in place at Malton Hall and Nelson tells Barnaby that they have got off on the wrong foot. Concluding that the body was removed via the window, Barnaby and Nelson interview the family and learn that Felix plans to affect a quick sale while a visit from the Reverend Melissa Ackers shows bad blood between the family and the vicar - when the body of the Lancasters' ex-nanny is stolen from the graveyard, Barnaby and Nelson are drawn into a macabre world as they seek to identify the culprit.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The village of Blacktrees-on-Marsh has long been haunted by a Cold War prophecy, prompting a small group of locals to form Midsomer’s first doomsday prepper group. Founded two decades ago by the obsessive Warren Kaine, the group provides comfort to its paranoid members - until the morning Warren receives a hoax call that nuclear missiles have launched. Racing to his bombproof underground bunker, he radios the others to join him. But as dawn breaks over village green serenity rather than a scorched earth, Warren's resentful wife Clodagh arrives at the shelter to find him dead. Pathologist Fleur Perkins discovers Warren was suffocated after someone with technical skills tampered with the air filter. As DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate, they must determine if someone was desperate to get their hands on the bunker, or if a killer is targeting the preppers. The pressure is on to catch the culprit before they strike again.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are stumped when they investigate the murders of David and Elaine Lerner, who were stabbed to death as they slept. The Lerners seemed to have been universally loved, and there is not a single lead which points to grievances against them - were they really the intended victims? Soon the police realise that a much more likely target for attack is the previous owner of the house - Camilla Mallon, a banker embroiled in a hedge fund scandal. Could the murders be a case of mistaken identity? As crown prosecutors Jake Thorne and Alesha Phillips try to navigate a case in which the suspect has no apparent motive or intent to commit the crime, can they make a murder charge stick? Meanwhile, Jake's old mentor Margaret Rumsfield argues that the accused should only face manslaughter charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team investigate when mother and carer Lia Brown is killed by a stray bullet, and find themselves struggling to understand the involvement of 12 year old Kaden Blake in her death. Kaden is caught up in the local gang culture, and keeping silent is his only protection. DS Matt Devlin is drawn to this damaged boy, saddened to see a life so doomed by circumstance and furious that local dealer and gang leader Mark Ellis remains untouchable by the law. Matt forces the hands of the crown prosecutors to move Ellis into the frame for Lia's death, but the culture of intimidation and silence which rules gang life seems set to undo all of the team's good work. It is up to Kaden himself to find the courage to speak out - but when he does so, he sets in motion a shattering chain of events.

Forest ranger Felicity Ward is driving at night when she is blinded by a searing light from an unidentified flying object - the following morning sees her car found abandoned at the roadside. Barnaby is called to the crime scene where a black pod containing Felicity's body is discovered - meanwhile, the nearby village of Cooper Hill is buzzing with news of the UFO as hoteliers Victor and Nadine Campbell, their daughter Orla, tour operator Abigail Tonev and her garage-owning son Nathan rely on a stream of ufologists for their businesses. Barnaby and Nelson visit Felicity's mother Valerie and fiance Brogan and they reveal that Felicity was going to confront ufologist Carter Faulkner about an illegal campsite - as they dig deeper, Barnaby and Nelson unearth suspicions, betrayals, and long-buried secrets of a terrestrial nature in their search for the truth.

programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. When respected surgeon Dan Marsden is shot dead days before his retirement and his teenage daughters Mira and Karen are abducted, DCI Vera Stanhope, DS Joe Ashworth and DC Kenny Lockhart must race against time to track down the killer and save the sisters. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting outside the Old Bailey leaves one police officer dead and another wounded in what seems to be a targeted attack on a witness giving evidence in an attempted murder trial. However, as Ronnie and the team investigate, they are surprised to learn that the gunman was specifically targeting police officers because he believes that his family were the victims of a police cover-up. The case is a taxing one and leaves the whole team emotionally spent. Things get tougher when defence barrister Doug Greer argues that his client was the victim of institutional racism. Have the detectives gone too far in their mission to bring a cop-killer to justice? The trial is at risk of being derailed because of a failure to separate the personal from the professional - can senior crown prosecutors Jake and Alesha manage to convince the jury that the defendant is a murderer rather than a victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a robbery goes wrong, an innocent have-a-go hero is shot dead and the two thieves take a cab driver hostage as they make their getaway. The police manage to capture one of the suspects, Frank Donovan, and they are desperate to find out the whereabouts of his hostage, who has a potentially fatal medical condition. Donovan realises that his knowledge gives him leverage, and he offers the team a deal - he will tell them where the cab driver is in return for an immunity agreement. Ronnie and Sam have just ten hours to find the hostage before the CPS is forced to agree to Donovan's terms. Donovan's lawyer, the uncompromising Miriam Pescatore, drives a hard bargain and, with no physical evidence to connect Donovan to the crime scene, must Jake and Alesha watch a self-confessed killer walk free?

As Greg warms down, an unseen assailant throws him from his bike and moves in for the kill... When news comes of the murder, DS Nelson explains the situation to DCI Barnaby while race official Damien Lamerat and local organiser Mary Appleton offer their cooperation and Des outlines the stakes when he tells Barnaby that this race is a make-or-break event for the cyclists. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Challis Court appears to be a serene retirement community for former police officers, but decades-old resentments still fester beneath the surface. When a resident is found murdered inside the gated estate, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter realise the killer is likely one of their own - an ex-cop. To crack the case, the duo must reopen the files on the legendary Goldman-Forbes heist from 30 years ago, a robbery that ruined reputations and left a long shadow. With several officers from the original investigation now living at Challis, Barnaby discovers that £300,000 remains motive enough for murder.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a petty criminal makes a deathbed confession about murdering a teenage girl, DS Ronnie Brooks has to re-open a 14-year-old case he was involved in during his drinking days. Now sober, Ronnie is shaken to the core when he has to revisit the case, which he thought he had put to bed a long time ago - not least when he is forced to question the conclusions he drew when his mind was clouded by alcohol. Did he make a serious error when he accused the girl's businessman father of her murder, or are the team wrong to believe the dying words of a drug addict? Ronnie finds himself torn between his former partner's unwavering belief that they got the right man and the mounting doubts of his current colleagues. He also begins to wonder if there may be other ghosts from his past addiction coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team starts to investigate after an elderly janitor is found murdered in his home, but the crime has been carried out with such precision and planning that the only evidence the killer leaves is designed to lead the detectives down a series of false trails. Could such masterminding be the work of someone not in control of their own actions? The defence argues that it could - but an altogether more sinister truth is uncovered by prosecutors Jake and Alesha.

programme.title: Goodbye, pet
programme.desc: Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais' classic comedy-drama series about a group of British builders in search of employment. The lads have a few days off and try to convince everyone that they are tourists rather than illegal workers, but their plans are thwarted when Oz and Bomber get into a fight with English tabloid journalists and Moxey attempts to ingratiate himself with the local expat community by going to the Britannia Inn and boasting that they are the Sheffield payroll robbers.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The pressure is on with the Round of 32 getting nearer and time running out for teams to make lasting impressions and prove that they have tournament-qualifying talent - the card this time features an eclectic mix of hard-hitting favourites like Copperhead and Deathroll, struggling mid-tier sleepers like Mammoth and Kraken, and an electric Main Event between two bots who are both desperate for a big win in the form of Series 5 runner-up Whiplash and the Brits with Bite and their bot Monsoon.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas searches for a missing girl, but his inquiries are complicated by fellow detective Luther Gillis, who muscles in on the case and proves to have a personal interest in seeing it resolved.

programme.title: Dempsey & Makepeace
programme.desc: The very first episode of the classic detective series. New York police lieutenant James Dempsey kills his corrupt partner Joey and has to lay low until the case can be further investigated - his superior O'Grady sends Dempsey to London in England as part of an exchange of officers. Chief Superintendent Spikings, the head of SI-10, is not too pleased to have a Yank forced onto his department, so he decides to couple Dempsey with his complete opposite in the form of Sergeant Harriet 'Harry' Makepeace - an upper-class English rose - on a case involving a mysterious shipment of caviar.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken's diplomatic skills are put to the test when two brothers inherit equal shares in a classic car and the parents of a university student studying art.

programme.title: The Champions
programme.desc: Fantasy espionage series. The Champions are enlisted to help when a mysterious plane destroys a US naval aircraft.

programme.title: Fewer
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is forced to broadcast his first-ever commercial on pirate radio when a rival car dealer tries to put him out of business with a nightmare test drive.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series set in the world of salvage. When Danielle accompanies Mike on a pick while Frank looks after the shop, the first-time picker strikes gold when she spots a derelict hotel filled with treasure.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora begin a bucket list fishing tour of Britain in Shropshire - their first mission is to catch a specimen crucian of over two pounds before they head to a top syndicate water called The Avenue, where the carp can weigh over an incredible 60 pounds. As they set themselves the crazy mission of both beating their current UK carp personal bests (PBs), Ali also calls in a favour from two Michelin-starred chef and carp angler Daniel Clifford to teach Zamo how to cook on the bank to stop him moaning...

programme.title: Beat the Chasers
programme.desc: Can a celebrity take on and defeat the greatest quiz team in the world? Bradley Walsh hosts as comedian Russell Kane, This Morning's Dr Zoe Williams, broadcaster Kaye Adams, journalist and presenter Matt Allwright and writer and broadcaster Gyles Brandreth take on the Chasers in a bid to win big money for their chosen charities.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is Queen of the Palace Fallon Sherrock, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.

programme.title: Classic Cartoon
programme.desc: Classic Cartoon adalah serial kartun anak - anak yang di dalamnya terdapat serial kartun Casper dan teman - temannya.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Kring Kring Ada Cerita
programme.desc: Sebuah Program yang berisikan pesan kebaikan yang disampaikan melalui dongeng, lagu dan drama singkat yang dibawakan oleh anak - anak.

programme.title: Si Unyil
programme.desc: Serial kartun produksi anak negeri yang telah dibuat ulang agar lebih menarik.

programme.title: Balita
programme.desc: Lagu Anak Indonesia BaLiTa menyajikan animasi lagu anak Indonesia yang lucu, video belajar membaca alfabet, berhitung dan menyanyi ditemani oleh trio Baba Lili Tata.

programme.title: Juki
programme.desc: Berada pada puncak ketenarannya, Juki dicintai banyak orang karena sikapnya yang polos, jenaka, dan berani untuk beda. Hingga sebuah kesalahan membuatnya berbalik menjadi musuh nomor satu masyarakat.

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.title: Bermain & Bergembira
programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.title: Neptune TV.

programme.title: Apose

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Dalam versi animasi ini karakter Mr. Bean lebih kompeten dan beruntung dengan nada suara yang unik dengan kisah yang masih sama yaitu bertahan hidup di kota London yang sangat kompetitif

programme.title: Brownies
programme.desc: Sangat mengasyikan menyimak obrolan Ruben Onsu, Ivan Gunawan, Ayu Ting Ting dan Wendi Cagur dalam sebuah talkshow unik. Tidak hanya ngobrol gosip terbaru, tapi juga ada tantangan dan kejutan

programme.title: Ikatan Cinta
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang tidak pernah baik jadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin

programme.title: Report sir
programme.desc: Lapor Pak! mengusung konsep komedi varietas dengan sketsa dan obrolan yang mengkomedikan kasus-kasus kriminal, isu terkini, dan gosip artis dengan bintang tamu yang sering muncul dalam berbagai peran.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Tulah 6/13
programme.desc: Gilang memutuskan untuk berlibur bersama Sarah dan Kevin, dua orang sahabatnya sejak SMA untuk merayakan ulang tahunnya. Rencana tersebut terganggu dengan kehadiran dua orang tamu tak diundang.

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan Nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Signal
programme.desc: Angkie dilahirkan sebagai gadis yang cantik dan normal. Namun, pada usia 10 tahun tiba-tiba pendengarannya berkurang secara drastis. Dokter memvonisnya kehilangan pendengaran selamanya.

programme.title: Comic 8: Casino Kings (Part 1)
programme.desc: Delapan agen rahasia yang berada di bawah pimpinan INDRO WARKOP ditugaskan untuk undercover menjadi COMIC atau Stand Up Comedian, demi mencari seorang comic yang menjadi penghubung ke seorang Master Kriminal bernama THE KING.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Tiba - Tiba Berondong
programme.desc: Bella, dosen psikologi 35 tahun yang mapan namun kesepian. Di dorong dengan tekanan keluarga, ia menggunakan aplikasi kencan & bertemu Langit, pria jenaka ternyata baru 19 tahun dan menjadi mahasiswa barunya, memicu dilema asmara.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Kolong Children
programme.desc: ARYA tumbuh sebagai anak pemberontak karena didikan keras Ayahnya yang merupakan seorang Tentara. Sang Ayah memaksa Arya untuk masuk Tentara, namun Arya menolak. Hal itu membuat Arya makin berjarak dengan Ayahnya.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Skaya & The Big Boss
programme.desc: Skaya dan Skara adalah kembar cewek-cowok tapi beda sekolah dan karakter. Suatu ketika Skara sakit dan harus menjalani perawatan medis sehingga Skaya terpaksa harus menyamar menjadi Skara di asrama.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Sincerely

programme.desc: From 2023. With his job, life and family disintegrating around him, Bernard dusts off a jewelery box and inadvertently releases the spirit Flora, who may be able to help him.

programme.title: The Rebellious Life of Mrs. Rosa Parks
programme.desc: From 2022. Based on the biography of Jeanne Theoharis, the documentary provides an insight into the life of the famous civil rights icon and reveals the real story of her rebellious activism in the fight against racial discrimination and injustice.

programme.title: Chosen Family
programme.desc: From 2024. Ann can't escape her family, her dating life, and her inability to say no, which means she's constantly trying to fix everyone else's problems. But can she finally put herself first when a new love enters her life?

programme.title: Goodrich
programme.desc: From 2024. Art dealer Andy Goodrich's life changes when his young wife begins a 90-day rehab program and at the same time threatens him with divorce.

programme.title: One of Them Days
programme.desc: From 2025. Dreux and Alyssa's friendship is put to the test as they struggle to find a way to avoid eviction.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: From 2023. After inheriting his father's hotel chain, Hal attempts to end his secret relationship with dominatrix Rebecca. Over the course of a nerve-wracking night, both fight to keep the upper hand, while the balance of power swings wildly back and forth.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: From 2024. A successful CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.title: Clown in a Cornfield
programme.desc: From 2025. Quinn and her father have just moved to Kettle Springs to start over. They find a divided local community in crisis. The conflicts grow, and a sinister figure emerges from the cornfields.

programme.title: The Nanny Sees All
programme.desc: From 2025. In an attempt to overcome her writer's block, Grace takes a job as a nanny to look after Andy, the mayor's son. But her life is soon in danger when the two previous nannies are found dead.

programme.title: Johnny English Reborn
programme.desc: From 2011. This time he fights against international assassins who are after the Chinese Prime Minister.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: From 2025. Best friends Nick and Will, along with NFL players Marquis and Corey, set out on a fishing trip over 100 kilometers off Florida. When they try to free a stuck anchor before a violent storm, the boat capsizes and throws them into the icy water.

programme.title: Rampage: Big Meets Bigger
programme.desc: From 2018. The primatologist Davis is best friends with a kind gorilla, George. But suddenly George changes and a giant flying wolf appears. Davis must find out what's going on - and stop it.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: From 2016. David Ghantt is a wealthy guy who works for a money transport company and is about to marry the crazy Jandice, and he dreams of a more exciting life. So when his beautiful colleague Kelly suggests they rob their employer, he agrees

programme.title: Stronger
programme.desc: From 2017. The inspiring and true story of Jeff Bauman, an ordinary 27-year-old man, who became a symbol of hope after the horrific bombing during the Boston Marathon in 2013.

programme.title: Official Secrets
programme.desc: From 2019. The true story of a British whistleblower who leaked information to the media about an illegal NSA operation, the purpose of which was to pressure the UN Security Council to approve the invasion of Iraq in 2003.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: From 1980. When Jake Blues gets out of prison, he and his brother, Elwood, set out to visit the orphanage where they grew up and were raised by nuns.

programme.title: Kraven the Hunter
programme.desc: From 2024. The brutal origin story of Marvel's iconic villain Kraven, a man with a complex relationship with his ruthless father, who becomes the world's greatest hunter.

programme.title: The taste of hunger
programme.desc: From 2021. Married couple Maggie and Carsten open the restaurant Malus. Their common dream is the famous Michelin star. But one day Carsten receives a letter that his wife loves someone else.

programme.title: Sicario 2: Soldier
programme.desc: From 2018. The drug war on the US-Mexico border is escalating, and the cartels have begun smuggling terrorists across the border. But FBI agent Graver is determined to win, and any means are allowed.

programme.title: Make a pie
programme.desc: From 2024. When Anette and Ben's daughter gets a role in a film with movie star Alicia, Ben is quickly attracted to Alicia. As Anette's suspicions about Ben's crush on Alicia intensify, their secrets and lies threaten to come to light

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: From 2018. Single mother Stephanie befriends the glamorous, fascinating and mysterious Emily. Suddenly, Emily disappears and Stephanie begins to investigate what has happened.

programme.title: A Dog's Journey
programme.desc: From 2019. Bailey is back! This time, the lovable dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the people he meets.

programme.desc: From 2019. Fred Flarsky is a journalist "who has taken a little break", but during the reunion with his first crush, Charlotte Field, he charms her.

programme.desc: From 2020. A disabled young woman who is homeschooled begins to suspect that the treatments she receives from her mother may not be what they seem - and that her mother is hiding a dark secret from her.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2

programme.title: The Adjustment Bureau

programme.title: Oh mama!
programme.desc: Sophie punya masalah. Hari pernikahannya hampir tiba dan dia tidak tahu siapa ayahnya. Bisa jadi salah satu dari mantan kekasih ibunya. Satu-satunya cara untuk mengetahuinya adalah dengan mengundang ketiganya ke pernikahannya.

programme.title: Mamma Mia: Here We Go Again!

programme.title: Balto

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Empat pasangan pergi ke sebuah pulau tropis dan terjebak dalam terapi pasangan di resor tersebut. Meskipun awalnya enggan dengan psikologi zaman baru yang diberikan kepada mereka

programme.title: Scott Pilgrim Vs. The World
programme.desc: Scott harus menghadapi sekelompok penjahat yang semakin kejam dari masa lalu gadis itu. Dan jika dia berharap untuk memenangkan cinta sejatinya, dia harus mengalahkan mereka semua sebelum semuanya benar-benar berakhir.

programme.title: Turbo

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Dalam puncak trilogi epik ini, Viking muda Hiccup dan naga Night Fury, Toothless, bertemu dengan Light Fury betina dan menghadapi ancaman terbesar mereka.

programme.title: Dr Seuss' How The Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: Di puncak Gunung Crumpet, Grinch mengamati penduduk Whoville dengan gembira bersiap untuk merayakan Natal. Dia memutuskan bahwa dia sudah muak dengan semua kebahagiaan ini, dan berkonspirasi untuk mencuri Natal dari Whoville!

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: Ben, seorang petugas keamanan sekolah, mencoba membuktikan dirinya layak menikahi saudara perempuan detektif James dalam sebuah patroli bersama di jalanan paling berbahaya di Atlanta.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: Jong-Gyu, seorang pengusir setan, melawan monster rubah yang menggoda setelah mereka menghancurkan hidupnya. Didorong oleh amarah, ia berlatih dengan seorang pertapa, menggunakan pedang pembunuh iblis. Perjalanannya mencapai puncaknya dalam pertarungan melawan raja iblis dunia bawah.

programme.title: The Case Of Disappearances
programme.desc: Ketika Qing Cheng masih remaja, ia diserang oleh monster mutan yang tidak dikenal dan kehilangan keluarga serta ingatannya. Ia dianggap oleh penduduk desa sebagai orang yang tidak menyenangkan yang akan membawa bencana.

programme.title: Streaming (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Cerita tentang seorang streamer misteri dengan jumlah pelanggan terbanyak, yang menyiarkan proses mengungkap petunjuk kasus pembunuhan berantai yang belum terpecahkan secara langsung.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Omniscient Reader: Prophecy
programme.desc: Novel favorit Dokja menjadi kenyataan yang mengerikan; dengan menggunakan pengetahuannya yang mendalam tentang kisah apokaliptik yang akan datang, pekerja kantoran itu mengubah takdirnya.

programme.title: The Moon
programme.desc: Seorang astronaut terdampar di luar angkasa karena sebuah kecelakaan saat melakukan penerbangan luar angkasa. Mantan direktur pusat antariksa pun berusaha keras untuk membawanya kembali ke bumi dengan selamat.

programme.title: Hopeless
programme.desc: Seorang remaja ingin melarikan diri dari kampung halamannya di mana kekerasan sering terjadi di antara tetangga. Karena putus asa membutuhkan uang, ia bergabung dengan sebuah geng untuk membantu keluarganya. Hidup barunya mulai terjebak dalam situasi yang semakin berbahaya saat ia berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Aksi akademi di mana anak laki-laki dengan peringkat terendah, yang hidup tanpa mimpi atau harapan, merebut kekuatan uang tanpa ragu-ragu dan berlari dengan kecepatan penuh.

programme.title: Single In Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho adalah seorang pemengaruh terkenal yang mengagungkan kehidupan lajang. Hyeon-Jin adalah seorang editor yang sangat ingin menemukan pasangan. Keduanya bertemu saat bekerja bersama untuk sebuah buku.

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026 Qualifying
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. We show the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in the practical test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by the industrial park at the Nürburgring. Headquarters of Phoenix Racing GmbH. From here, the team of Swabia-born Ernst Moser shakes up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Of what used to be over 300 tractor manufacturers, only three remain in Germany today. One of them is DEUTZ. In addition to the change in tractor construction from the simple tractor to the all-rounder with over 100 possible work steps, Made in Germany also shows the lean and efficient production and assembly, which is still largely manual work. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: IAA Mobility 2021 – A trade fair is moving
programme.desc: Something had to happen! New name, new location, new trade fair concept. After the decline in visitors in recent years, the International Motor Show is moving from Frankfurt to Munich. In addition to the exhibition halls, visitors can visit the free open space or take test drives. Over 100 premieres from the automotive sector show where the mobility of the future is headed. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans and the first Porsche to ever bear the famous name of the design genius from Austria: The Type 64, a racing car from 1938 that is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome. But the war intervened... (channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Le Mans. The toughest car race in the world. Porsche has competed in the 24-hour classic every year since 1951. The prototypes from Zuffenhausen won 16 times – more often than any other manufacturer in Le Mans history. There are also over 100 class victories. No other brand has shaped the race like Porsche. And no other race is as closely associated with Porsche as Le Mans. Porsche at Le Mans is an incredible success story. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: With Perfect Ride the horsepower is thrown. Armin Schwarz's tires glow on ice and snow in Finland. Drift until the snow watch comes. Also: An extravagant duel at the CES in Vegas: Mercedes, the Warrior of the Stars versus Audi, Lord of the Rings. The latest technological wonders in direct comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a close look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Pascal Kapp's rallies are different from all other classic car rallies. These include the Upper Bavarian Master Classic, the Saxon Master Classic, the 10 Lakes Rally and, last but not least, the one-day rally 333 minute rally, which - as the name suggests - has to be driven in exactly 333 minutes. A day full of driving fun for the participants with a wide variety of special tests guarantees the best entertainment for the top speed spectators in this episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Fine tuning of superlatives – the Mansory Conquistador. A car for 750,000 euros. Pure power and no trace of understatement. With the Mercedes CLK DTM AMG the road becomes a race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel. (Station info).

programme.title: Belgian Rally Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Belgian Rally Championship is one of the most competitive rally championships at national level. This also attracts prominent guest starters such as Thierry Neuville, Craig Breen and Stéphane Lefebvre. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Children's of Alabama Indy GP, Barber Motorsports Park, Alabama

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: Grand Prix of Ilse de la Reunion, Clermont-Fernand
programme.desc: The X-Trial World Championship is an indoor motorcycle series in which riders must overcome obstacles on the track (channel info).

FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: Southern 100
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Classic motorcycles are back in fashion. Honda is also reflecting on its great tradition and with the CB 1100 EX has revived a big bike that could have ridden on our streets in the flashy seventies. Nostalgic spoke wheels complete the design of the elegant four-cylinder bike with sufficient 94 hp power, more than enough for a relaxed cruise into the sunset. How does the CB 1100 EX compare to rivals like the BMW R nineT? The Japanese classic in the MOTORVISION TV driving test. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Children's of Alabama Indy GP, Barber Motorsports Park, Alabama

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: More and more traffic, tight delivery schedules and a constant flood of information – professional drivers don't have it easy. At the same time, modern trucks offer new digital features that make driving safer and more efficient. MOTORVISION visits the traditional Swedish manufacturer Volvo Trucks, watches the development of new automation systems and goes on a journey with the digital giants. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world of classic automobiles is colorful and diverse. Crass rally cars from the eighties with a lot of noise, cute little cars to kiss and big chrome sleds from America with big V8 engines and lots of torque. In "Best of Classic Ride" we once again present you the most beautiful stories from the past broadcasts. (Channel info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today we are at the DTM show event in Munich in the Olympiahalle. A mega event and battle between the Audi and Mercedes brands. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. 5.7 liter displacement, 345 hp, 6 seconds from zero to one hundred and a top speed of 274 km/h - the Corvette C5 was the most brutal monster on America's roads at the time. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Our mechanic guys also urgently need help - the lowrider star is still hanging around tired on the tow truck, even though he's about to dance. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: For the showreel, the stunt heroes at action concept film an epic body fight between law enforcement officers and outlaws on the run - and the full program: severe beatings in close combat, glass bottles burst on heads, bodies fly through walls. Finally, the gangster car flies over 15 meters high, detonates in the air and leaves a trail of destruction behind. Full double action in one episode. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this Top Speed ​​episode, presenter Martin Utberg is invited by the art expert Detlev Kümmel, known from the popular TV show Bares for Rares. Also there are classic car owner Lars Wygoda and artist Jakob Reh, who portrays Lars' Volkswagen Beetle from 1972 in a special way under the attentive eyes of Kümmel. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a racetrack icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: Grand Prix of Ilse de la Reunion, Clermont-Fernand
programme.desc: The X-Trial World Championship is an indoor motorcycle series in which riders must overcome obstacles on the track (channel info).

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Acura Grand Prix of Long Beach, Streets of Long Beach, California

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. Our day tours led to the famous Dikti Mountains. This film also shows the Lasithi plateau, the famous Vai Beach and a tour to the former hippie village and the caves of Matala. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Tenerife is not just a paradise for pensioners and winter refugees. The island also attracts adventurers who want to explore breathtaking landscapes on winding roads on their motorcycles. M-Motorradreisen has now included the unique natural backdrop with the omnipresent, 3715m high Teide, lush forests and deep blue oceans in its program for the second time. This travel documentary shows the most beautiful tours on the two Canary Islands. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 Tour
programme.desc: Long distances and electric cars have not been friends so far. But that should change, for example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 in the Pro S version offers a range of around 700 km and, as a tourer, also plenty of space - the perfect companion for a road trip. We drive through Sweden in the electric station wagon and check consumption, driving characteristics and comfort. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: These four-wheelers can handle everything from sand to water to difficult terrain. Even on a week-long expedition through the most remote places, they don't give up. We check what's behind the new Land Rover Defender Trophy and test the special model. We also reveal 5 exciting facts about the Ineos Grenadier. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The Range Rover Velar – The vehicle is a milestone for the traditional British company Land Rover. It takes the mid-size SUV segment to a whole new level of luxury. Extendable door handles and laser lights are just two of the many technical highlights. MOTORVISION TV accompanies the creation of the Velar and shows English craftsmanship paired with modern mass production. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Autonomous driving, the Internet of Things or artificial intelligence – technology makes it possible, but most people are afraid and anxious. In the future, will we all be slaves to technology and dependent on machines that can do everything themselves and perhaps even better than us? No fear! Part four of Grüne Welle gets you ready for the mobile future and gives you in-depth insights into the technology of tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether it's the Porsche 918 Spyder, Audi R8, Mercedes AMG GT or BMW i8, they are the fastest, most spectacular and most sought-after supercars in the world, with breathtaking speeds and incredible engine performance: German supercars not only lead the way because of their unique performance, but also set standards with their design and innovative technology. DreamCars presents the most exciting and fastest German super sports cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Two different horses from the same stable: Ford Consul Coupe and Mercury Cougar. Which of the two classic coupes is more fascinating, the Teutonic Consul or the Big Banger Cougar? Also: The legends return – The Silver Arrows at the Großglockner Grand Prix. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In 2019, Porsche celebrated 70 years of sports car history. For this occasion, it was decided to recreate a completely new vehicle of the type 993 based on an existing original bodyshell - the unique "Project Gold". Also: the Q5 Sportback, Audi's mid-range SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Auto Union – The story of the four rings
programme.desc: It is the second largest German car manufacturer before the war, Auto Union. In 1932, the economic crisis brought the Horch, DKW, Audi and Wanderer brands together to form Auto Union. Car History tells the whole story of Auto Union, its four brands, the exciting cars and the big Grand Prix victories of the spectacular Silver Arrows in the 1930s. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Crash or be crashed, that is the big question at the stock car race in Herzfelde! It doesn't take much to catapult your competitors out of the race. Take a vehicle that is ready for scrap, remove the glass, small parts, back seat and passenger seat. Airbags are undesirable. A crash helmet, seat belt and roll bar are completely sufficient here. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: A boat with four wheels: a floating float! There are still some examples of them around and we have found the most beautiful ones for you! (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and a car radio are not enough for this event. Performance and pressure are what count in Sinsheim. Only here at the Car and Sound trade fair does the sound level become an experience. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: How do stunts work? What exactly does a stuntman do? Who are the real heroes of action films? The unique series “Stunt Heroes” on MotorvisionTV has been answering these and other questions for two years. The stunt people from Action Concept, one of the largest film and stunt productions in Europe, give a unique insight into their daily work and into what cannot be seen in the film. Weeks of preparation are often necessary for a 5-second film stunt. Backbreaking work! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Martin Utberg visits the artist Andrew McGeachy in Thun, where he portrays an Alfa Romeo Montréal. In front of Schadau Castle, the viewer learns everything about the design and history of this iconic sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. We started our day tours to experience Crete from the Robinson Club in Ierapetra. The documentary shows the most beautiful mountain roads and bays in the eastern part of the island. Our day tours led to the famous Dikti Mountains. This film also shows the Lasithi plateau, the famous Vai Beach and a tour to the former hippie village and the caves of Matala. The highlight is the ride up to the mountain village of Ethia on what is probably one of the most spectacular (station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Crete is the largest of the Greek islands and a motorcycle paradise. Curves overlooking the sea, mountain passes up to 1200m and sensational panoramas, gorges and hospitable people. programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: Tenerife is not just a paradise for pensioners and winter refugees. The island also attracts adventurers who want to explore breathtaking landscapes on winding roads on their motorcycles. M-Motorradreisen has now included the unique natural backdrop with the omnipresent, 3715m high Teide, lush forests and deep blue oceans in its program for the second time. This travel documentary shows the most beautiful tours on the two Canary Islands. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sweden road trip with the VW ID.7 Tour
programme.desc: Long distances and electric cars have not been friends so far. But that should change, for example with this vehicle: The VW ID.7 in the Pro S version offers a range of around 700 km and, as a tourer, also plenty of space - the perfect companion for a road trip. We drive through Sweden in the electric station wagon and check consumption, driving characteristics and comfort. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Sonsio GP, Indianapolis Motor Speedway Road Course, Indiana

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Qatar, Ski Division, Old Doha Port
programme.desc: The UIM-ABP Aquabike Class Pro World Championship starts a new action-packed season. The registered pilots promise exciting races on the water again this year. (Station info).

programme.title: P1 Class 1 Offshore Championship 2024
programme.desc: The premier class of racing boats, the Class 1 championship, starts south of Tampa in Sarasota. An exciting race with catamarans with over 1,000 hp is on the program on the west coast of Florida. Who will win? (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Phoenix Racing GmbH, run by the Swabian-born Ernst Moser, is shaking up the world's race tracks. The founding members' obsession with starting their own racing team turned into a successful company in just a few years.

programme.title: Green wave

programme.desc: The program discusses why the International Motor Show is moving to Munich. The number of visitors has been declining for several years and in Munich visitors can visit the free open space and take test drives.

programme.desc: The most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain are on display. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and British flair.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: It is the "Holy Grail" for Porsche fans: the Type 64, which is based on the Volkswagen developed by Professor Ferdinand Porsche. Only two of the streamlined cars were built in 1938 and were intended to take part in a race from Berlin to Rome.

programme.desc: Klaus Niedzwiedz makes his way to the Hockenheimring in the Porsche Taycan.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Le Mans race is the toughest car race in the world and lasts 24 hours. Porsche starts every year. No other brand has had such an impact on the legendary race. The show tells the story of Porsche's success at Le Mans.

programme.title: Nordschleife
